response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with a long, progressively senior track record spanning full-stack, embedded, and platform work. Current staff-level role directly covers TypeScript/Node.js product work plus AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which matches the rare 'AI agent development' requirement. Strong testing culture (TDD, test libraries, workshops), polyglot proficiency, and Docker/Kubernetes experience align well. The main gaps are no evidence of Nest.js or Kotlin, and frontend depth skews toward Ember rather than React, though React appears in recent commercial work.
strengths: Current hands-on work with TypeScript/Node.js plus AI-agent and MCP tooling, a direct match for a rare job requirement
Deep testing and software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, ran testing workshops)
Broad polyglot full-stack experience with cloud, Docker, Kubernetes, MongoDB/MySQL at meaningful scale
concerns: No demonstrated Nest.js experience, a core framework in the primary stack
Frontend experience leans heavily on Ember; React exposure appears limited to one recent role
No evidence of Kotlin, and Java experience appears dated and secondary

key_factors.factor: Extensive TypeScript/Node full-stack seniority with strong testing practices
Missing Nest.js and limited React/Kotlin depth
